# 09 — Run Specific Agent

<context-hint>
Use when Boss has assigned a specific agent and task.
</context-hint>

<task>
Run the specified specialist agent using the assignment brief below.
</task>

<fill-in>
Agent file:
Assignment ID:
Objective:
Spec sections:
Files to read:
Expected files to modify:
Acceptance criteria:

</fill-in>

<instructions>
1. Read the specified agent file.
2. Read `protocols/compiled-protocols.md`.
3. Read `company/CURRENT_CYCLE.md`, `company/ONE_TASK_ONE_PR.md`, and `company/DO_NOT_TOUCH.md`.
4. Execute only the assignment scope.
5. Do not broaden scope.
6. Update handoff and relevant docs.
7. Use compact YAML report.
</instructions>
